add-text-field-to-pdf-page.title: Add Text Field to PDF Page
add-text-field-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a text form field named 'CustomerName' on page 1 of a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf Facades API.

add-unchecked-checkbox-field-to-pdf-page.title: Add Unchecked Checkbox Field to PDF Page
add-unchecked-checkbox-field-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert a checkbox form field on a specific PDF page and set its default state to unchecked using Aspose.Pdf.

add-radio-button-group-to-pdf-form.title: Add Radio Button Group to PDF Form
add-radio-button-group-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create a radio button group named "PaymentMethod" with options "Credit" and "PayPal" on page 3 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a submit button into a PDF form on page 1 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor and save the updated PDF.

attach-javascript-alert-to-pdf-push-butt.title: Attach JavaScript Alert to PDF Push Button
attach-javascript-alert-to-pdf-push-butt.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to set a JavaScript action on a push‑button field so that an alert is displayed when the button is clicked.

decorate-pdf-form-field-appearance.title: Decorate PDF Form Field with Custom Appearance
decorate-pdf-form-field-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom border color, background shade, and font style for a specific PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

apply-default-decoration-to-text-fields.title: Apply Default Decoration to All Text Form Fields
apply-default-decoration-to-text-fields.description: Shows how to configure a FormFieldFacade with visual attributes and use FormEditor to decorate every text form field in a PDF document.

set-form-field-alignment-to-center.title: Set Form Field Alignment to Center
set-form-field-alignment-to-center.description: Demonstrates how to open an existing PDF form, set the horizontal alignment of the "Address" field to center using FormEditor and FormFieldFacade, and save the updated PDF.

set-custom-image-background-for-signatur.title: Set Custom Image Background for Signature Field
set-custom-image-background-for-signatur.description: Shows how to apply a custom appearance with an image background to a PDF signature field named "Signature" using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-form-field-attribute.title: Set PDF Form Field Attribute Using FormEditor
set-pdf-form-field-attribute.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to set a predefined attribute (Required flag) on a PDF form field and highlights that custom attributes are not supported by this API.

set-numeric-limit-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Numeric Limit for PDF Form Field
set-numeric-limit-for-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to restrict the "Quantity" AcroForm field to values between 1 and 100 by applying a character limit using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-list-item-to-dropdown-field.title: Add List Item to Dropdown Field in PDF
add-list-item-to-dropdown-field.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to add a new option to an existing dropdown (combo box) form field on a specific page of a PDF and save the result.

remove-list-item-from-pdf-form-field.title: Remove List Item from PDF Form Field
remove-list-item-from-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific list item ("Option B") from a list box field named "Choices" on a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

copy-pdf-form-field-content.title: Copy PDF Form Field Content to Another Field
copy-pdf-form-field-content.description: Shows how to read the value of a form field and write it to a different field in the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

copy-form-field-to-another-page.title: Copy and Rename PDF Form Field on a Specific Page
copy-form-field-to-another-page.description: Shows how to copy the outer definition of an existing PDF form field to a given page and rename it using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

move-pdf-form-field.title: Move PDF Form Field to New Position
move-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to relocate a form field to specific coordinates on a target page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

remove-form-field-from-pdf.title: Remove Form Field from PDF
remove-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a specific form field from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

rename-pdf-form-field.title: Rename PDF Form Field Using FormEditor
rename-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to rename a form field throughout a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

add-email-validation-javascript-to-pdf-f.title: Add Email Validation JavaScript to PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-javascript-to-pdf-f.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a text box field named "Email", and attach JavaScript that validates the email format on the blur (lost focus) event.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to FDF
export-pdf-form-fields-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all form fields from a PDF document into an FDF file for external processing.

import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-form-fields.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF Form Fields
import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to import field values from an XFDF file into an existing PDF form and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-add-hidden-processeddate-field.title: Batch Add Hidden ProcessedDate Field to PDFs
batch-add-hidden-processeddate-field.description: Shows how to loop through all PDF files in a folder and add a hidden text field named "ProcessedDate" with a generated GUID using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

apply-consistent-decoration-to-checkbox-.title: Apply Consistent Decoration to All Checkbox Fields in PDFs
apply-consistent-decoration-to-checkbox-.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDFs in a directory, configure visual attributes with FormFieldFacade, and apply those attributes to every checkbox field using FormEditor.

batch-update-submit-button-urls.title: Batch Update Submit Button URLs in PDFs
batch-update-submit-button-urls.description: Shows how to process a folder of PDF files, locate submit buttons, and change their submission URL to a new address using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

clear-and-populate-dropdown-list.title: Clear and Populate Dropdown List in PDF Form
clear-and-populate-dropdown-list.description: Shows how to remove all existing items from a combo box (dropdown) field and add new items using Aspose.Pdf Facades FormEditor.

populate-pdf-listbox-with-country-names.title: Populate PDF ListBox with Country Names
populate-pdf-listbox-with-country-names.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to add 195 country items to a ListBox field in a PDF form.

clear-pdf-form-field-on-focus.title: Clear PDF Form Field on Focus with JavaScript
clear-pdf-form-field-on-focus.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a text box form field named 'DiscountCode', attach a JavaScript action that clears the field when it receives focus, and save the updated document.

copy-form-field-definitions-to-pdf.title: Copy Form Field Definitions from Template to PDF
copy-form-field-definitions-to-pdf.description: Shows how to enumerate form fields in a template PDF and copy their definitions to another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

move-pdf-form-fields-by-offset.title: Move PDF Form Fields by Offset
move-pdf-form-fields-by-offset.description: Shows how to shift all form fields in a PDF by a fixed (10,15) offset using Aspose.Pdf core API together with the FormEditor facade.

batch-rename-pdf-form-fields.title: Batch Rename PDF Form Fields with Aspose.Pdf
batch-rename-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF form fields and rename any field whose name starts with a given prefix using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

set-text-field-multiline.title: Set Text Field to Multiline in PDF
set-text-field-multiline.description: Shows how to convert a single‑line text field named "Comments" into a multiline field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

set-signature-field-border-width.title: Set Signature Field Border Width in PDF
set-signature-field-border-width.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with the Form facade, locating the "Signature" form field, setting its border thickness to 2 points, and saving the updated document.

set-form-field-background-color.title: Set Form Field Background Color to Light Green
set-form-field-background-color.description: Demonstrates how to change the background color of a PDF form field named "Status" to light green using FormFieldFacade.

add-hidden-sessionid-field-to-pdfs.title: Add Hidden SessionId Field to PDFs in Batch
add-hidden-sessionid-field-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a folder, bind each with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, create a zero‑size hidden TextBoxField named SessionId containing a generated GUID, add it to the document's AcroForm, and save the modified PDF.

attach-js-validation-to-pdf-submit-butto.title: Attach JavaScript Validation to PDF Submit Button
attach-js-validation-to-pdf-submit-butto.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade to bind an existing PDF, add a JavaScript script to a submit button that validates required fields, and save the modified document.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing AcroForm fields with the Form facade and export the field definitions to a pretty‑printed JSON file.

create-pdf-form-fields-from-json.title: Create PDF Form Fields from JSON Definition
create-pdf-form-fields-from-json.description: Shows how to read field specifications from a JSON file and add matching form fields to a newly created PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

set-phone-number-field-limit.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Form Field
set-phone-number-field-limit.description: Shows how to limit the number of characters a user can enter in a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

set-date-field-format-in-pdf.title: Set Date Field Format in PDF Form
set-date-field-format-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate a DateField named "Date" in a PDF form and change its display format to MM/dd/yyyy using Aspose.Pdf.

add-reset-form-button-to-pdf.title: Add Reset Form Button to PDF
add-reset-form-button-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a push‑button field that resets all form fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

restrict-pdf-form-field-to-integer-range.title: Restrict PDF Form Field to Integer Range 0-100
restrict-pdf-form-field-to-integer-range.description: Shows how to limit a PDF form field's character length and attach JavaScript to enforce that the 'Score' field accepts only integer values between 0 and 100 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

attach-javascript-validation-to-pdf-form.title: Attach JavaScript Validation to PDF Form Field
attach-javascript-validation-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use the FormEditor facade to attach a JavaScript script to the "Age" form field that alerts the user when the entered value is less than 18, and then save the modified document.

copy-image-form-field-to-another.title: Copy Image Form Field to Another PDF Field
copy-image-form-field-to-another.description: Demonstrates how to copy the content of an image form field (e.g., a logo) to a new image field within the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

remove-empty-pdf-form-field.title: Remove Empty PDF Form Field
remove-empty-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to read a PDF form field value and delete the field when it contains no user input, using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

rename-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.title: Rename PDF Form Fields Using a CSV Mapping
rename-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.description: Shows how to read old‑new field name pairs from a CSV file and rename PDF form fields using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF with Appearance
add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature form field named "DigitalSignature" to a PDF using FormEditor, set a graphic appearance, and digitally sign the field with a certificate via PdfFileSignature and PKCS1.

set-pdf-form-field-required.title: Set PDF Form Field as Required
set-pdf-form-field-required.description: Demonstrates how to mark a PDF form field as required using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor and persist the change to a new file.

apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-text-field.title: Apply Custom Font to All PDF Form Text Fields
apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom font (Arial Bold) for every text form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

batch-add-selectall-checkbox-to-pdf.title: Batch Add SelectAll Checkbox to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-selectall-checkbox-to-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder and add a checkbox form field named "SelectAll" to the first page of each document using Aspose.Pdf.

move-form-field-to-bottom-margin.title: Move Form Field to Bottom Margin on All PDF Pages
move-form-field-to-bottom-margin.description: Demonstrates how to reposition a specific form field (FooterNote) to the bottom margin of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, calculating coordinates per page and updating the field appearance.

add-javascript-to-quantity-field-total-p.title: Add JavaScript to Quantity Field for Total Price Calculation
add-javascript-to-quantity-field-total-p.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf so that when the Quantity field changes, the TotalPrice field is automatically recalculated from a hidden UnitPrice field.

export-import-pdf-form-fields-xml.title: Export and Import PDF Form Fields using XML
export-import-pdf-form-fields-xml.description: Shows how to export form field data from a PDF to an XML file and later re‑import that XML back into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

import-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.title: Import PDF Form Fields from XML While Preserving Order
import-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, import form field values from an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the updated document while keeping the original field order.

add-list-box-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add List Box Field to PDF Form
add-list-box-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a ListBox form field named "Priority" with items Low, Medium, High and a default value Medium into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-button-fields-from-pdf-form.title: Remove Button Fields from PDF Form
remove-button-fields-from-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, identify all button form fields, delete them, and save the cleaned document using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-pdfs-unique-form-fields.title: Merge PDFs and Ensure Unique Form Field Names
merge-pdfs-unique-form-fields.description: Demonstrates concatenating multiple PDF form files while automatically renaming duplicate field names by enabling KeepFieldsUnique and setting a UniqueSuffix on PdfFileEditor.

add-email-validation-script-to-pdf-form-.title: Add Email Validation Script to PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-script-to-pdf-form-.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript regular‑expression validation script to an "Email" form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

decorate-pdf-form-field-background-image.title: Decorate PDF Form Field with Background Image and Centered Text
decorate-pdf-form-field-background-image.description: Shows how to set alignment and background color for a PDF form field and then add a background image that appears behind the field content using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-hidden-numeric-version-field.title: Add Hidden Numeric Version Field to PDF
add-hidden-numeric-version-field.description: Shows how to create a hidden numeric text field named "Version" in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save the modified document.

copy-form-field-to-new-field-on-page.title: Copy Form Field Definition to New Field on Specific Page
copy-form-field-to-new-field-on-page.description: Shows how to copy the outer definition of an existing PDF form field to a new field on a given page using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

move-signature-field-to-lower-right-corn.title: Move Signature Field to Lower Right Corner on Page 5
move-signature-field-to-lower-right-corn.description: Shows how to reposition an existing signature form field to a specific lower‑right location on page 5 using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

enable-rich-text-formatting-for-pdf-form.title: Enable Rich Text Formatting for PDF Form Field
enable-rich-text-formatting-for-pdf-form.description: Shows how to retrieve a 'Comments' field, cast it to RichTextBoxField, enable multiline input, set a default appearance, and assign an RTF value using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-populate-date-field.title: Add JavaScript to Populate Date Field on PDF Open
add-javascript-populate-date-field.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF that sets the "Date" form field to the current date when the document is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-checkboxes-to-fdf.title: Export Checkbox Fields to FDF
export-checkboxes-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to export only checkbox form field definitions from a PDF to an FDF file by marking non‑checkbox fields as non‑exportable and using the Form facade's ExportFdf method.

import-checkboxes-from-fdf.title: Import Checkbox Definitions from FDF into PDF
import-checkboxes-from-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, import checkbox definitions from an FDF file using the Form facade, merge them with existing fields, and save the resulting document.

add-state-combo-box-to-pdf-form.title: Add State Combo Box to PDF Form
add-state-combo-box-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a combo box field named "State" into an existing PDF form and fill it with US state abbreviations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-taxrate-readonly-calc-js.title: Make PDF Form Field Read‑Only and Add JavaScript Calculation
set-taxrate-readonly-calc-js.description: Shows how to set a PDF form field to read‑only and attach a JavaScript calculate action that computes TaxRate as 10% of the Subtotal field using Aspose.Pdf facades.

decorate-list-box-fields.title: Decorate List Box Fields with Uniform Border and Background
decorate-list-box-fields.description: Shows how to apply a consistent border style, width, color, and background color to all list box form fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

rename-pdf-form-fields-to-camelcase.title: Rename PDF Form Fields to camelCase
rename-pdf-form-fields-to-camelcase.description: Loads a PDF, enumerates its form fields, converts each field name to camelCase, and batch renames the fields using FormEditor.

add-print-dialog-button-to-pdf.title: Add Print Dialog Button to PDF
add-print-dialog-button-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a push button into a PDF that triggers the browser's print dialog via JavaScript using Aspose.Pdf.

hide-form-field-exportable.title: Hide Form Field While Keeping It Exportable
hide-form-field-exportable.description: Shows how to set a PDF form field to hidden using the NoView flag with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor, so the field is not visible but still exported in form submissions.

copy-notes-to-summary.title: Copy Notes Field to Summary Field in PDF Form
copy-notes-to-summary.description: Shows how to read the value of a PDF form field and write it to another field using Aspose.Pdf.

move-pdf-form-fields-page-2.title: Move PDF Form Fields on a Specific Page
move-pdf-form-fields-page-2.description: Shows how to shift the position of form fields on page 2 of a PDF by 5 points using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-numeric-two-decimal-validation.title: Set Numeric Two-Decimal Validation for PDF Form Field
set-numeric-two-decimal-validation.description: Shows how to locate a TextBoxField named 'Discount' in a PDF, limit its length, configure combs, and attach JavaScript to enforce numeric input with two‑decimal precision using Aspose.Pdf.

attach-confirmation-js-to-pdf-submit-but.title: Attach Confirmation JavaScript to PDF Submit Button
attach-confirmation-js-to-pdf-submit-but.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to set a submit URL, configure the submit flag, and attach JavaScript that shows a confirmation dialog before submitting the PDF form.

add-gender-radio-button-group-to-pdf.title: Add Gender Radio Button Group to PDF
add-gender-radio-button-group-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a radio button group named "Gender" with options Male, Female, and Other into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

remove-temporary-form-fields-from-pdf.title: Remove Temporary Form Fields from PDF
remove-temporary-form-fields-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate and delete form fields whose names start with "Temp_" in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then save the cleaned document.

convert-single-line-to-multi-line-addres.title: Convert Single-Line PDF Form Field to Multi-Line with Auto-Wrap
convert-single-line-to-multi-line-addres.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to change a PDF AcroForm text field from single-line to multi-line, enabling word-wrap and dynamic height.

add-hidden-authtoken-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden AuthToken Field to PDF
add-hidden-authtoken-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a cryptographically secure token and embed it as a hidden text box form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

duplicate-pdf-form-field.title: Duplicate PDF Form Field Using FormEditor
duplicate-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates copying an existing form field named 'Signature' to a new field 'SignatureCopy' on the same page with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

move-pdf-form-field-to-top-left.title: Move PDF Form Field to Top‑Left Corner
move-pdf-form-field-to-top-left.description: Demonstrates how to reposition an existing form field named "Logo" to the top‑left corner of the first page using Aspose.Pdf Facades, with a specific width and height.

add-input-mask-to-pdf-form-field.title: Add Input Mask to PDF Form Field
add-input-mask-to-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to the FormEditor facade and attach JavaScript that enforces a phone number mask (###) ###‑#### on a form field.

attach-javascript-to-resetform-that-also.title: Attach Javascript To Resetform That Also Clears Hidden Fields During Reset

export-pdf-form-field-layout-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Field Layout to JSON
export-pdf-form-field-layout-to-json.description: Extracts the position and page information of each form field in a PDF and writes it to an indented JSON file for UI reconstruction.

import-form-field-layout-from-json.title: Import Form Field Layout from JSON into PDF
import-form-field-layout-from-json.description: Shows how to read field definitions from a JSON file and add them to a newly created PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.
